user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate 3-phase PWM motor control to new AURIX target
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase PWM on EGTM Cluster_1 ATOM0 channels 0/1/2 at 20 kHz, center-aligned, complementary via DTM with 1 µs rising/falling dead-time; enable syncStart and syncUpdate; allow independent duty updates; raise a period event ISR on CPU0 (prio 20) to toggle LED P13.0; map outputs to PHASE_U/V/W HS/LS pins on P20.8/9/10/11/12/13; use ATOM clock = FXCLK_0 and DTM clock = CLK0, enabling FXCLK_0 and CLK0. ISR registration: handler declared with IFX_INTERRUPT(EgtmAtom_PeriodIsr, 0, 20); prototype void EgtmAtom_PeriodIsr(void); source initialized via IfxSrc_init(&SRC_EGTM1_ATOM0_CH0_SR0, IfxSrc_Tos_cpu0, 20) and enabled with IfxSrc_enable(&SRC_EGTM1_ATOM0_CH0_SR0); ISR calls IfxEgtm_Pwm_interruptHandler() then toggles P13.0.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use the unified high-level IfxEgtm_Pwm driver on TC4xx to configure EGTM Cluster_1 ATOM0 CH0/1/2 as a synchronized, center-aligned 3-channel PWM group with complementary outputs via DTM and 1 µs dead-time. Enable EGTM CMU FXCLK_0 for ATOM and CLK0 for DTM. Map TOUT pins with IfxEgtm_PinMap. Install a period event ISR on CPU0 (priority 20) that calls IfxEgtm_Pwm_interruptHandler and toggles LED P13.0 via IfxPort.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified EGTM PWM driver supports synchronized multi-channel PWM on ATOM with DTM-based complementary outputs, center-aligned mode, dead-time insertion, and synchronized start/update — exactly matching motor 3-phase inverter requirements on TC4xx.

runtime_function.name: updateEgtmAtom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Perform independent, immediate duty updates per phase while maintaining synchronized timing across channels.

api_changes.reason: TC3xx→TC4xx watchdog migration (use IfxWtu APIs on TC4xx)

migration_notes.context_preserved:
The unified IfxEgtm_Pwm driver is used to configure EGTM Cluster_1 ATOM0 CH0/1/2 for 20 kHz center-aligned PWM with complementary DTM outputs and 1 µs dead-time. SyncStart is achieved with IfxEgtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels; syncUpdate is honored by using the unified driver's synchronized update paths, while independent phase duty updates are performed via IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelDutyImmediate. FXCLK_0 and CLK0 are enabled via IfxEgtm_Cmu/IfxEgtm_Dtm APIs. A period ISR on CPU0 (prio 20) invokes IfxEgtm_Pwm_interruptHandler and toggles LED P13.0 using IfxPort. Pin mapping uses IfxEgtm_PinMap for the specified P20.x TOUTs.
Exact EGTM TOUT pin macros (from IfxEgtm_PinMap.h for the target board):
- PHASE_U_HS  (P20.8)  : IfxEgtm_Atom_Tout_0_P20_8_OUT
- PHASE_U_LS  (P20.11) : IfxEgtm_Atom_Tout_0N_P20_11_OUT
- PHASE_V_HS  (P20.9)  : IfxEgtm_Atom_Tout_1_P20_9_OUT
- PHASE_V_LS  (P20.12) : IfxEgtm_Atom_Tout_1N_P20_12_OUT
- PHASE_W_HS  (P20.10) : IfxEgtm_Atom_Tout_2_P20_10_OUT
- PHASE_W_LS  (P20.13) : IfxEgtm_Atom_Tout_2N_P20_13_OUT

PWM.rationale: âœ… Available in template | âœ… Matches target family (TC4xx) | Complexity: advanced | Best for: 3-phase inverter, motor control, multi-channel synchronized PWM | Features: multi_channel_sync, complementary_pairs, dead_time, center_aligned, edge_aligned

testability.overview: Architecture includes abstraction and hooks to enable unit and integration testing without hardware dependencies.

abstractions.pwm_interface: Wrap IfxEgtm_Pwm calls behind a thin interface (EgtmPwmIf) with function pointers to allow mocking in unit tests.
abstractions.gpio_interface: Wrap IfxPort operations behind a GPIO facade (GpioIf) providing toggle/read/write APIs.

mocks_and_stubs.pwm_driver_mock: Provide a mock EgtmPwmIf implementation to simulate duty/frequency updates and ISR callbacks.
mocks_and_stubs.gpio_mock: Provide a mock GpioIf that records pin state changes for assertions.
mocks_and_stubs.isr_hook: Expose a weak ISR handler that can be overridden in tests to capture period events.

simulation.pwm_waveform_model: Optional software model to compute expected edge times for center-aligned PWM with dead-time; compare against calls observed in the mock.
simulation.timebase: Use a virtual timer source in tests to drive ISR invocation deterministically.

integration_testing.loopback_strategy: On target, support optional loopback by routing one TOUT to an input capture pin; on HIL, verify frequency/duty via logic analyzer scripts.
integration_testing.diagnostic_counters: Expose counters for ISR executions, missed updates, and last applied duty per phase.
